---
id: update-group-data
title: "UpdateGroupData"
description: "通过该接口可以实现修改群组资料信息，包括群组头像、群组名称、群组公告等。"
api: 
info_path: core_products/zim/zh/docs_zim_server_zh/group/open-api-desc
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>UpdateGroupData</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"post"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


通过该接口可以实现修改群组资料信息，包括群组头像、群组名称、群组公告等。

修改群组资料成功后，群成员可通过以下 ZIM SDK 的回调接口接收群组资料修改通知：
| iOS-25% | Android-25% | macOS-25% | Windows-25% |
|-----|---------|--------|---------|
| [groupNameUpdated](/zim-ios/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimgroupnameupdatedoperatedinfogroupid-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupNameUpdated](/zim-android/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupnameupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupNameUpdated](/zim-macos/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimgroupnameupdatedoperatedinfogroupid-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupNameUpdated](/zim-win/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupnameupdated-zimeventhandler) |

| Web-25% | 小程序-25% | Flutter-25% | React Native-25% |
|---------|-----|--------|---------|
| [onGroupNameUpdated](/zim-web/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupnameupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupNameUpdated](/zim-miniprogram/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupnameupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupNameUpdated](/zim-flutter/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupnameupdated-zimeventhandler) | [onGroupNameUpdated](/zim-rn/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupnameupdated-zimeventhandler) |

| Unity3D-25% | uni-app \| uni-app x-25% | HarmonyOS-25% |
|---------|---------|-----------------|
| [OnGroupNameUpdated](/zim-u3d/client-sdks/api-reference/class#ongroupnameupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupNameUpdated](/zim-uniapp-x/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#groupnameupdated-zimeventhandler) | [groupNameUpdated](/zim-harmonyos/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#groupnameupdated-zimeventhandler) |

<Note title="说明">由于参数 `GroupAvatar`、`GroupName` 和 `GroupNotice` 支持设置为空字符。因此，如果无需修改上述某个字段，JSON 字符串中不能包含该字段名称（不能传空），否则会被认为是空字符串，原有内容会被删除。</Note>

<Note title="说明">调用频率限制：20 次/秒。</Note>

## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","description":"> 接口原型参数\n>\n> https://zim-api.zego.im/?Action=UpdateGroupData\n","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["UpdateGroupData"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。应用 Id，由 ZEGO 分配的用户唯一凭证。可从 <a target=\"_blank\" href=\"https://console.zego.im/\">ZEGO 控制台</a> 获取。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。16 位 16 进制随机字符串（8 字节随机数的 hex 编码）。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。当前 Unix 时间戳，单位为秒。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>，最多允许 10 分钟的误差。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名版本号。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名，用于验证请求的合法性。请参考[签名机制](/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism)生成。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>
<MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime request"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json-schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details mime"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-mime"}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-body"}>Body</h3><strong className={"openapi-schema__required"}>required</strong></summary><ul className={"request-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"FromUserId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 32 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"修改群资料的操作者 ID（已注册）。","maxLength":32,"example":"user"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"GroupId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 32 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"待修改资料的群组 ID。","maxLength":32,"example":"111"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"GroupAvatar"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 500 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"群组头像地址，长度限制 500 字符。\n>注意\n>\n>群组头像、群组名称和群组公告至少有一个。\n","maxLength":500,"example":"https://xxx.com/xxx.png"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"GroupName"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 50 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"群组名称，长度限制 50 字符。","maxLength":50,"example":"newName"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"GroupNotice"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `<= 300 characters`"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"群组公告，长度限制 300 字符。","maxLength":300,"example":"newNotice"}}></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem></MimeTabs>
<div><div><ApiTabs label={undefined} id={undefined}><TabItem label={"200"} value={"200"}><div>OK</div><div><MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime"} schemaType={"response"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json"}><SchemaTabs className={"openapi-tabs__schema"}><TabItem label={"Schema"} value={"Schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details response"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-response"}><strong>Schema</strong></summary><ul className={"response-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Code"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"number","description":"返回码。\n\n以下仅列出了接口业务逻辑相关的返回码，完整返回码请参考 [全局返回码](/zim-server/return-codes)。\n<table>\n<thead><tr><th>返回码</th><th>描述</th><th>处理建议</th></tr></thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr><td>660000002</td><td>参数错误。</td><td>请参考 Request 输入正确参数。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660300006</td><td>调用接口的频率超出了群/房间限制。</td><td>请稍后再试。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660500002</td><td>FromUserId 未注册。</td><td>请先注册 FromUserId。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600001</td><td>群组不存在。</td><td>请确认 GroupId 是否正确。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600009</td><td>获取群组相关信息失败。</td><td>请先确认 GroupID 是否正确。如正确，请联系技术支持。</td></tr>\n<tr><td>660600028</td><td>修改群组资料失败。</td><td>请联系 ZEGO 技术支持。</td></tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Message"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"操作结果描述。","example":"success"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"RequestId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"请求 ID。","example":"343649807833778782"}}></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example (from schema)"} value={"Example (from schema)"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"343649807833778782\"\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem></SchemaTabs></TabItem></MimeTabs></div></TabItem></ApiTabs></div></div>
